name: Donna Brazile
subject: re: Russian interference in our elections
body:
Americans deserve an indpendent, bipartisan investigation into Russian interference
---
**Call on Congress to begin an independent, bipartisan investigation into Russian interference in the 2016 election:

** **[ADD MY NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stand-Up-for-Democracy?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+MY+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20161219_db_f&source=em_20161219_db_f")**
Friend --

By now, Americans know beyond any reasonable doubt that the Russian government orchestrated a series of cyberattacks on political campaigns and organizations over the past two years and used stolen information to influence the presidential campaign and congressional races.

We know that these intrusions were more than just "hacks" -- they were attacks on the United States by a foreign power.

Unfortunately, there is still too much that we don't know about the motives, methods, and specific objectives of the Russian government. Without that understanding, our country will be left vulnerable to similar attacks in future elections.

That's why, yesterday, I sent a letter to Paul Ryan calling on Congress to begin an independent, bipartisan investigation into Russia's unprecedented interference in the 2016 election. The integrity of our elections is too important for Congress to refuse to take these attacks seriously.

**If you agree that the American people deserve answers, then add your name to mine and demand a full investigation from Congress:**

**[http://my.democrats.org/Stand-Up-for-Democracy](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/Stand-Up-for-Democracy?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+httpmydemocratsorgStandUpforDemocracy&utm_campaign=em_20161219_db_f&source=em_20161219_db_f")**

Thank you,

Donna

Donna Brazile
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c266/4067b0a/22dd88047/7e062bed/2146787865/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161219_db_f&source=em_20161219_db_f"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c266/4067b0a/22dd88047/7e062bea/2146787865/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161219_db_f&source=em_20161219_db_f"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c266/4067b0a/22dd88047/7e062beb/2146787865/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161219_db_f&source=em_20161219_db_f") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c266/4067b0a/22dd88047/7e062be8/2146787865/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161219_db_f&source=em_20161219_db_f"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

name: DSCC Membership Team
subject: Democrats need you to renew [pending]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Renewing your support today is crucial to help Democrats win the fights ahead. Will you vote on our new membership card design? [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eead/2b07114c/4129547c/7368c0cf/4274651185/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/dscc-member-vote?source=PT-20161219-Membership-ProsHV")
---
Friend -- 2017 is fast approaching and it is critical that Democrats are united stronger than ever to take on Donald Trump and the GOP Congress.

**[That's why it's so important to vote on our official 2017 member card and renew your DSCC membership today! Friend, what should Democrats carry for the fights ahead?](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eead/2b07114c/4129547c/7368c0cf/4274651185/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/dscc-member-vote?source=PT-20161219-Membership-ProsHV")**

| [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eead/2b07114c/4129547c/7368c0cf/4274651185/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/dscc-member-vote?source=PT-20161219-Membership-ProsHV")
---

All three designs depict why Democrats must buckle down now: From protecting President Obama's legacy, declaring our Democratic pride, to showing what values we stand for -- each is a powerful reminder of what Trump and Mitch McConnell must reckon with.

And by renewing your support today, not only will you send a message to Republicans, but you'll also help the DSCC get ready to take back the Senate in 2018!

[**Friend, your vote on the official DSCC member card is crucial to represent our party! Will you pick your favorite design and renew your membership today?**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eead/2b07114c/4129547c/7368c0cf/4274651185/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/dscc-member-vote?source=PT-20161219-Membership-ProsHV")

We value your renewed commitment and are grateful to count on grassroots Democrats like you who understand the stakes this year.

Thanks for being such a great supporter,
DSCC Membership Team

**A quick note on donations, Friend:**

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-20161219-Membership-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&amounts=200,150,75,50,25&amount=25&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eead/2b07114c/4129547c/7368c0c9/4274651185/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eead/2b07114c/4129547c/7368c0c8/4274651185/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eead/2b07114c/4129547c/7368c0cb/4274651185/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Celebrate=20Vermont?=
subject: Celebrate Vermont Gala
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
### **_The Honorable Philip B. Scott and Mrs. McTeague-Scott with their family request the pleasure of your company at_

Celebrate Vermont Gala**

**_an Inaugural celebration of the Governor and the State of Vermont_**
Benefiting those who have served and those who continue to serve
_Army Aviation Support Facility_
_1238 Airport Parkway_
_South Burlington, Vermont 05403_

_Saturday, the seventh of January two thousand and seventeen_
_Half past seven_ Cocktails & Hors d’oeuvres Music by Blue Jay Way & Dancing

Semi formal
Black tie optional
Celebrate Vermont Gala 7:30
Gates close 9:00
Gala concludes 11:00
For security purposes the last day of ticket sales will be Tuesday, December 27, 2016
**No exceptions! **
Tickets will not be available at the door

Also for security purposes you will receive a temporary ticket after your payment is processed. You must bring this document the night of the event or you will be refused admission.
**No exceptions!**
After presenting your temporary ticket at the gate, you will receive a commemorative ticket that will grant you admission to the event. **Valid state or federally issued identification required for entry**
All attendees and carry items are subject to search, refusal will be grounds to prohibit admission
Weapons are prohibited

500 complimentary tickets will be available to military and public safety personnel in uniform
Spouses and family members of military and public safety personnel must purchase general admission tickets
**General admission $50**

Tickets can be purchased over the phone at [(802) 476-8188](tel:\(802\)%20476-8188)
Additionally, tickets can be purchased at the Barre Opera House box office located at 6 North Main Street. Box office hours: Tuesday – Friday, noon – 5:30 p.m. and Saturday, 9:00 am – noon. Please note that the box office will be closed from Christmas Eve through New Year’s Day.

**Purchase tickets online from the Barre Opera House by clicking**[**here**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=623614fd44&e=19cebfe173). The Barre Opera House accepts VISA, MasterCard, Discover and American Express as well as checks.
Make checks payable to:
**Barre Opera House
PO Box 583
Barre, VT 05641**

Several sponsorship levels are available for the pre gala reception. To become a sponsor contact Dawn Terrill [dawnterrill@msn.com](mailto:dawnterrill@msn.com)

**The Sheraton Hotel** has made available specially priced rooms for those attending the Gala Saturday night. When booking rooms use the code **“Celebrate Vermont”** to get the **$99 a night** rate. The Sheraton is located at 870 Williston Road, South Burlington, VT 05403
For questions please e-mail [CelebrateVermont@philscott.org](mailto:CelebrateVermont@philscott.org)

[**For the RSVP response document, click here.**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=415e3b7ee3&e=19cebfe173 "Inaugural Response")
---
| | Phil Scott for Governor, Glen Wright, Treasurer,
46 Three Mile Bridge Road, Middlesex, VT 05602

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75128fb49c&e=19cebfe173) or [unsubscribe from this list](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/unsubscribe?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75128fb49c&e=19cebfe173&c=c0b2056903)
---

name: Kate Black, EMILY's List
subject: The situation in Texas and Ohio >>
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c77f9/24c69fd9/250061/18ef7e97/2659505847/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEX22N_digital_email_20161219_OHTX_n-all&source=WPEFEX22N_digital_email_20161219_OHTX_n-all")
---

Peter,

Republicans aren't even waiting for Trump to take office to start attacking women and choice.

Here's the situation: In Ohio, the GOP-controlled state legislature just passed a 20-week abortion ban that Governor Kasich signed into law. And this is the guy who ran as a moderate in the GOP presidential primary?!

And in Texas? A new rule requires women to prepare funeral services if they have a miscarriage or abortion. It's a disgusting attempt to shame women when they're most vulnerable.

Before this year's election, the GOP had held back on some of these bills because they thought they'd get shut down in court. But now they're steamrolling ahead in anticipation of judicial appointments and an anti-choice Supreme Court thanks to Donald Trump's victory.

**[Donate $3 now to fight back against Republicans' increasing attacks on choice, and replace them with as many pro-choice Democratic women as we can.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c77f9/24c69fd9/250061/18ef7e90/2659505847/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161219_email_OHTX?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+now+to+fight+back+against+Repub&utm_campaign=WPEFEX22N_digital_email_20161219_OHTX_n-all&source=WPEFEX22N_digital_email_20161219_OHTX_n-all")**

If this is what Trump's GOP allies have the nerve to do before he takes office, just imagine how emboldened they'll feel on January 21st.

Fifteen states besides Ohio already have a 20-week abortion ban. There's a very good chance a case against one of them ends up in front of the Supreme Court -- which still has an open seat thanks to Senate Republicans' obstruction.

And Texas is ignoring objections from medical groups and women alike on the Republicans' "funeral rule" -- it's a purely political act to appease anti-choice groups and shame women. If you wonder where Texas might've gotten this idea, look to Indiana, where Vice President-elect Mike Pence signed a similar bill into law.

These laws and rules are terrifying and offensive. And states like Indiana, Ohio, and Texas are setting a precedent for others around the country.

**We can't sit by and let Republicans dictate women's health care decisions. Donate $3 now to replace them with pro-choice Democratic women:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Fight-Back](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c77f9/24c69fd9/250061/18ef7e91/2659505847/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161219_email_OHTX?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgFightBack&utm_campaign=WPEFEX22N_digital_email_20161219_OHTX_n-all&source=WPEFEX22N_digital_email_20161219_OHTX_n-all")**

Thank you,

Kate Black
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c77f9/24c69fd9/250061/18ef7e92/2659505847/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161219_email_OHTX?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFEX22N_digital_email_20161219_OHTX_n-all&source=WPEFEX22N_digital_email_20161219_OHTX_n-all")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c77f9/24c69fd9/250061/18ef7e93/2659505847/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WPEFEX22N_digital_email_20161219_OHTX_n-all&source=WPEFEX22N_digital_email_20161219_OHTX_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c77f9/24c69fd9/250061/18ef7e8c/2659505847/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WPEFEX22N_digital_email_20161219_OHTX_n-all&source=WPEFEX22N_digital_email_20161219_OHTX_n-all"). clean_body: | "" Peter, Republicans aren't even waiting for Trump to take office to start attacking women and choice. Here's the situation: In Ohio, the GOP-controlled state legislature just passed a 20-week abortion ban that Governor Kasich signed into law. And this is the guy who ran as a moderate in the GOP presidential primary?! And in Texas? A new rule requires women to prepare funeral services if they have a miscarriage or abortion. It's a disgusting attempt to shame women when they're most vulnerable. Before this year's election, the GOP had held back on some of these bills because they thought they'd get shut down in court. But now they're steamrolling ahead in anticipation of judicial appointments and an anti-choice Supreme Court thanks to Donald Trump's victory. "" If this is what Trump's GOP allies have the nerve to do before he takes office, just imagine how emboldened they'll feel on January 21st. Fifteen states besides Ohio already have a 20-week abortion ban. There's a very good chance a case against one of them ends up in front of the Supreme Court -- which still has an open seat thanks to Senate Republicans' obstruction. And Texas is ignoring objections from medical groups and women alike on the Republicans' "funeral rule" -- it's a purely political act to appease anti-choice groups and shame women. If you wonder where Texas might've gotten this idea, look to Indiana, where Vice President-elect Mike Pence signed a similar bill into law. These laws and rules are terrifying and offensive. And states like Indiana, Ohio, and Texas are setting a precedent for others around the country. We can't sit by and let Republicans dictate women's health care decisions. Donate $3 now to replace them with pro-choice Democratic women: "" Thank you, Kate Black Vice President of Research, EMILY's List "" | EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office. | Paid for by EMILY's List "" and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List.
